description: CLI output + error-shaping layer. Closes FGAP-020 (addressed read returns the full subtree CLI-side via an addressedReadOverride helper that re-runs the read with structureForRead({whole:true}), bypassing collection-paging, still 50KB-capped — does NOT touch the op), FGAP-021 (--format text|json|table render dispatch, lifting the scripts' renderTable/renderTerse bodies into a CLI render module), and FGAP-023 (AJV ValidationError translation in the cli.ts catch via a lifted formatAjvError). All at the cli.ts emit/catch region (~:504-518) + a new CLI render/helper module in-pi dispatch never touches.
acceptance_criteria: FGAP-020 closed: read-schema / read-config --path at an object node returns the full subtree from the CLI (matching the orchestrator script), op unchanged
FGAP-021 closed: --format selects a human render for ops whose script twins offer one
FGAP-023 closed: AJV validation errors surface field-named guidance, not the raw .message
Canonical pipeline green (incl. runtime demo + fresh adversarial audit)
notes: Release-group: cli-parity (NEXT) | order 2/5 | addresses FGAP-020, FGAP-021, FGAP-023 | categories: CLI-only-shared-helper + CLI-post-call (R-0003)
